# IOSurfaceLookupFromXPCObject(_:) | Apple Developer Documentation

- [ IOSurface ](/documentation/iosurface)

- [ IOSurfaceLookupFromXPCObject(_:) ](/documentation/iosurface/iosurfacelookupfromxpcobject(_:))

-  IOSurfaceLookupFromXPCObject(_:) 

Function# IOSurfaceLookupFromXPCObject(_:)

iOS 11.0+iPadOS 11.0+Mac Catalyst 13.1+macOS 10.7+

```
func IOSurfaceLookupFromXPCObject(_ xobj: xpc_object_t) -> IOSurfaceRef?
```

## [Discussion](/documentation/iosurface/iosurfacelookupfromxpcobject(_:)#Discussion)

This call takes an XPC object created via IOSurfaceCreateXPCObject() and recreates an IOSurfaceRef from it. Note: This call does NOT destroy the port.
